===Pokémon Adventures===
[[File:Iono Adventures.png|220px|thumb|Iono in Pokémon Adventures]]
Iono debuted in ''[[PASV11|Decisive! The Battle in the Sky!!]]''. She was first seen in [[Levincia]], where she received a challenge from {{adv|Nemona}} and {{Scarlet}}. Once both challengers successfully completed their Gym Tests, Iono faced Scarlet in a Gym battle first. Scarlet easily took down Iono's first two Pokémon and sent out her {{p|Pikachu}}, which she taught the move {{m|Dig}} as a countermeasure for when Iono {{Tera}}stallized her final Pokémon. Iono boasted that her {{p|Mismagius}} was invincible, as it possessed the {{a|Levitate}} Ability, making {{type|Ground}} moves useless against it.

Scarlet eventually emerged victorious while managing to prevent Iono from using Terastallization, but when Nemona questioned her strategic decisions during the match, Scarlet revealed it was intentional. Just before they battled, Iono requested that Scarlet help create a battle that would get lots of views. As compensation, Scarlet asked to have an all-you-can-eat buffet at every food stall in Levincia to make up for Iono having no information on the [[treasures of ruin]]. Afterward, Iono called Nemona over to have their Gym battle.

|desc={{p|Bellibolt}} is Iono's second known Pokémon. It was first used to battle {{Scarlet}}'s {{p|Armarouge}}. It tried attacking with a super effective {{m|Water Gun}}; Armarouge easily dodged with {{m|Substitute}} before taking Bellibolt out with {{m|Mystical Fire}}.

Bellibolt's only known move is {{m|Water Gun}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Iono
|pkmn=Mismagius
|type1=Ghost
|tera=Electric
|img=Iono Mismagius Adventures.png
|epnum=PASV12
|epname=Stream! Iono Zone!!
|desc={{p|Mismagius}} is Iono's third known Pokémon. It was first used to battle {{Scarlet}}'s {{p|Pikachu}}. Despite Scarlet teaching her Pikachu a {{t|Ground}} move in advance to counter Iono's {{t|Electric}} types, Iono boasted that her Mismagius's {{a|Levitate}} Ability and {{Tera|Tera Type}} made it invincible. It managed to take down Scarlet's Armarouge and {{p|Floragato}} before losing to her Pikachu.

Mismagius's known moves are {{m|Phantom Force}} and {{m|Confuse Ray}}, and its Ability is {{a|Levitate}}{{tt|*|mentioned only}}.}}
